 {"id":"beads_rust-od2j","title":"Unit tests: Entry point modules (main.rs, lib.rs, logging.rs)","description":"# Unit Tests for Entry Point Modules

## Background
These core modules lack unit tests and are only tested indirectly via E2E.

## Modules to Test

### main.rs
- CLI argument parsing
- Command dispatch logic
- Error code mapping
- Global flag handling (--json, --verbose, --quiet)

### lib.rs
- Public API surface
- Module re-exports
- Feature flag conditionals

### logging.rs
- Logger initialization (init_logging)
- Test logger (init_test_logging)
- Log level parsing
- Tracing subscriber configuration

## Test Cases

### main.rs Tests
1. Parse valid command arguments
2. Parse global flags (--json, --verbose)
3. Error exit codes match expected
4. Version output format
5. Help output contains all commands

### lib.rs Tests
6. Public API accessible
7. Feature-gated modules conditional
8. No panic on initialization

### logging.rs Tests
9. init_logging doesn't panic
10. init_test_logging is idempotent
11. Log level respects RUST_LOG env
12. Test writer captures output

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 3 modules have #[cfg(test)] sections
- [ ] 12+ unit test functions total
- [ ] No mocks - test real behavior
- [ ] Tests pass in isolation","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"JadeBeaver","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T14:28:09.580033086Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T15:18:47.534259133Z","closed_at":"2026-01-17T15:18:47.534259133Z","close_reason":"Added unit tests for main/lib/logging; ran cargo test --lib and cargo test --bin br","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"beads_rust-od2j","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-an3","type":"parent_child","created_at":"2026-01-17T14:28:18.831246303Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"beads_rust-oqa","title":"External dependency resolution (external:<project>:<capability>)","description":"# External Dependency Resolution (external:<project>:<capability>)

## Purpose
Support classic external dependency semantics for ready/blocked and dependency trees.

## Encoding
- External dependency ID: `external:<project>:<capability>`
- Satisfied when external project has a **closed** issue labeled `provides:<capability>`.

## Config
- `external_projects` in config.yaml maps project name → path.

## Behavior
- External deps are **not** stored in blocked cache.
- Evaluated at query time (ready/blocked/tree) to avoid multi-DB work during cache rebuild.
- Open each external project DB **once per project**, batch by capability.

## Output
- In dep tree, synthesize external leaf nodes:
  - status `closed` if satisfied, else `blocked`
  - title prefixed `✓` or `⏳`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Ready/blocked filters respect external deps.
- External deps appear in dep tree (down direction only).

## Tests
- Mock external project with provides labels.
- Unresolved external deps remain blocking.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T07:03:46.203704905Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T03:53:40.739867167Z","closed_at":"2026-01-17T03:53:40.739867167Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"compacted_at_commit":"","original_size":0}
 {"id":"beads_rust-oqw","title":"Shell Completions","description":"## Overview
Implement shell completion scripts for bash, zsh, fish, and PowerShell using clap_complete. This enables tab-completion for commands, options, and issue IDs.

## Technical Requirements

### Clap Complete Integration
```rust
use clap_complete::{generate, Generator, Shell};

fn generate_completions<G: Generator>(gen: G, cmd: &mut Command, name: &str, out: &mut dyn Write) {
    generate(gen, cmd, name, out);
}

// CLI command to generate completions
#[derive(Subcommand)]
enum CompletionCommands {
    /// Generate shell completions
    Completions {
        #[arg(value_enum)]
        shell: Shell,
    },
}

fn handle_completions(shell: Shell) {
    let mut cmd = Cli::command();
    match shell {
        Shell::Bash => generate_completions(Shell::Bash, &mut cmd, "br", &mut io::stdout()),
        Shell::Zsh => generate_completions(Shell::Zsh, &mut cmd, "br", &mut io::stdout()),
        Shell::Fish => generate_completions(Shell::Fish, &mut cmd, "br", &mut io::stdout()),
        Shell::PowerShell => generate_completions(Shell::PowerShell, &mut cmd, "br", &mut io::stdout()),
        _ => eprintln!("Unsupported shell"),
    }
}
```

### Dynamic Completions
For dynamic values like issue IDs:
```rust
// Custom completer for issue IDs (zsh/fish support)
fn complete_issue_ids() -> Vec<String> {
    // Read from cache file or query DB
    if let Ok(contents) = fs::read_to_string(".beads/.id_cache") {
        contents.lines().map(|s| s.to_string()).collect()
    } else {
        Vec::new()
    }
}
```

### Installation Instructions
```
# Bash (add to ~/.bashrc)
eval "$(br completions bash)"

# Zsh (add to ~/.zshrc)
eval "$(br completions zsh)"

# Fish (add to ~/.config/fish/config.fish)
br completions fish | source

# PowerShell (add to $PROFILE)
br completions powershell | Out-String | Invoke-Expression
```

## Completions Provided

### Command Completions
```
br <TAB>
create  update  close  reopen  list  show  ready  blocked
dep     label   comment search  stats sync  config  doctor  prime
```

### Option Completions
```
br create --<TAB>
--title  --type  --priority  --assignee  --labels  --deps
--description  --parent  --due  --json  --robot

br list --<TAB>
--status  --type  --priority  --assignee  --labels
--sort  --limit  --json
```

### Value Completions
```
br create --type=<TAB>
bug  feature  task  epic  question  docs  chore

br list --status=<TAB>
open  in_progress  closed  all

br show <TAB>
beads_rust-abc123  beads_rust-def456  beads_rust-ghi789
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Generate bash completions
- [ ] Generate zsh completions
- [ ] Generate fish completions
- [ ] Generate PowerShell completions
- [ ] Complete command names
- [ ] Complete option names
- [ ] Complete option values (enum types)
- [ ] Dynamic issue ID completion (if feasible)
- [ ] Installation instructions in --help

## Dependencies
- Requires `clap_complete` crate (already in Cargo.toml)
- Requires CLI Skeleton (Command definition)

## Rationale
Shell completions dramatically improve CLI usability. Users can discover available commands and options via tab completion. Dynamic issue ID completion saves typing and reduces errors.

 {"id":"beads_rust-orko","title":"Fix clippy/cargo warnings (sqlite.rs + tests)","description":"Address current warning set blocking clippy: unused variable external_db_paths (src/storage/sqlite.rs), dead_code query_external_project_capabilities, doc_markdown backticks in epic child map doc, cast_possible_truncation/sign_loss in epic counts, needless_question_mark in query_external_project_capabilities, and deprecated assert_cmd::cargo::cargo_bin in tests/e2e_audit.rs.","notes":"Clippy -D warnings currently also fail on tests/e2e_audit.rs (uninlined_format_args, single_char_pattern, needless_borrows_for_generic_args) and tests/e2e_changelog.rs (uninlined_format_args). Observed during cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"OpusAgent","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:30:24.351170966Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T18:20:08.167353303Z","closed_at":"2026-01-17T18:20:08.167353303Z","close_reason":"cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings now passes with no errors. cargo fmt --check also passes.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0}
